name: DG Set Control Panel (Generator Chalane Wala Board)
shortDescription: Generator ko chalu aur band karne ke liye sabse aasan board.
description: Yeh board generator ko chalu aur band karne ke kaam aata hai. Isme ek chhota screen laga hota hai jo generator ki speed aur oil (tel) ka level batata hai. Yeh generator ko kharab hone se bachata hai aur safe rakhta hai.

specs.name: Power Capacity
specs.value: Factory and Badi Building ke liye

specs.name: Metal Box
specs.value: Waterproof aur Strong Lohe ka Dabba

features: Automatic chalu aur band ho jata hai
Kharab hone se pehle hi warning de deta hai
Emergency stop button laga hai turant band karne ke liye
Aasan wiring hai jisse repair karna aasan ho

name: Electric Control Panel (Sadharan Bijli Board)
shortDescription: Factory aur ghar ke liye bijli chalu-band karne ka aasan aur safe board.
description: Yeh ek aasan bijli ka board hai jisse aap factory ki machines ko chalu aur band kar sakte hain. Ise chalana bohot surakshit hai, isme shock nahi lagta aur lohe ka dabba bohot mazboot hota hai.

specs.name: Current Range
specs.value: Ghar se lekar Badi Factory tak ke liye

features: Har jagah ke hisab se chhota ya bada banaya ja sakta hai
Shockproof hai aur aag lagne ka khatra nahi hota
Mazboot powder coating hai jisse zang (rust) nahi lagta
Hawa aane-jaane ka rasta hai taaki board garam na ho

name: HT LT Panel (Badi Line ka Board)
shortDescription: Badi line ki bijli ko factory me baantne wala mazboot panel.
description: Badi-badi factories me aane wali tezz bijli ko alag-alag machines tak surakshit tareeqe se pahunchane wala board. Yeh automatic kaam karta hai aur short circuit hone par bijli turant band kar deta hai taaki accident na ho.

specs.name: Safety Rating
specs.value: Short Circuit se poori tarah surakshit

features: Badi power line ko sambhalne ke liye khas switches
Short circuit ya overload hone par apne aap trip ho jata hai
Galat operation ko rokne ke liye automatic lock system
Ek dum mazboot double door safety dabba
applications: Saria aur Cement banane ki factory
Solar Power Plants (Dhoop se bijli banane wali jagah)

name: APFC Panel (Bijli ka Bill Kam Karne Wala Board)
shortDescription: Factory ka bijli ka bill kam karne aur power save karne wala panel.
description: Yeh panel factory me chalne wali badi machines ki wajah se hone wale bijli ke nuksaan ko rokta hai. Isse aapki factory ka bijli ka bill kam ho jata hai aur sarkar ki taraf se koi penalty nahi lagti.

specs.name: Heat Release
specs.value: Automatic fan system board thanda rakhne ke liye

features: Bijli ke power factor ko 0.99 tak banaye rakhta hai (High Efficiency)
Machines ko overvoltage se bachata hai
Automatic switch system hai, khud hi power save karta hai
Bijli board ki penalty se aapka paisa bachata hai
applications: Aata chakki (Flour Mill) aur oil mill

name: PCC Panel (Main Power Control Board)
shortDescription: Poori factory ki bijli ko ek hi jagah se control karne wala panel.
description: Yeh poori factory ka main board hota hai. Yahan se aap poori building ya factory ki bijli ko ek saath band ya chalu kar sakte hain. Yeh bohot mazboot lohe se bana hota hai aur heavy load ko aasaani se jhelta hai.

specs.name: Enclosure Safety
specs.value: Dust and Water resistant (Dhoor-mitti se surakshit)

features: Mazboot copper busbars jo heavy load jhel sakein
Bina heat huye lagatar chalne ki shamta
Screen par dikhta hai kaunsi line me kitni bijli ja rahi hai
Double door safety lock compartment
applications: Steel rolling mills aur iron factories

name: Fire Hydrant Panel (Aag Bujhane Wali Machine ka Board)
shortDescription: Aag lagne par pani ke pumps ko automatic chalane wala emergency panel.
description: Agar building ya factory me aag lag jaye, toh yeh board automatic pani ke pump ko chalu kar deta hai taaki aag ko jaldi se jaldi bujhayi ja sake. Yeh panel har samay standby par rehta hai aur aapaat-kaal me khud hi chalu ho jata hai.

specs.name: Alarm Support
specs.value: Hooter / Siren aag lagne ka shor karne ke liye

features: Pressure kam hote hi apne aap pump chalu kar deta hai
Emergency siren ko bajata hai sabko satark karne ke liye
Battery backup system taaki bijli jaane par bhi pump chale
Waterproof coating taaki pani padne par bhi short circuit na ho
applications: Chemical aur paint factory (Jahan aag ka zyada darr ho)
